introContentList: This provides a summary of any payment choices you make for your benefit beginning September 1, 2020.
You can change your form of payment (up to the last business day before your benefits begin).

deferToolTip.tipIntro: If you don't want to receive benefits on that date, you may choose to Defer. There are several reasons
deferToolTip.tipRollover: why you may wish to defer

tipContentList.tipContent: You can skip (defer) making a pension choice and come back to make that choice later.
You may choose to defer payment of a pension benefit if:
tipContentBulletList: You want to make your health care choices and prefer to begin pension benefits later.
You (or your spouse, if applicable) have other sources of income and don't need your pension benefits now.
You don't want to pay taxes (if applicable) on your benefits until later.

planList.planNote: Note: Amounts are before tax, and don't include any payments to your beneficiary after you die (if applicable).

benefitList.benefitDescription: Simple Election Alternate—Simple Election Opfm Gp

summaryContentList: Payment destination decisions are part of the next step. Continue once you’ve made all your payment option choices.

deferModalContent.deferAllTitle: Do you want to defer all your payments?
deferModalContent.deferAllBody: If you want to receive all your pension benefits at a later date, choose Yes.
deferModalContent.deferPlanTitle: Do you want to defer your payments for the plan?
deferModalContent.deferPlanBody: If you want to receive these pension benefits at a later date, choose Yes.

quitModalContent.title: What do you want to do?

bodyList.heading: Save
bodyList.paragraph: Keep the choices you've made, so far. Finish making pension choices later.

bodyList.heading: Quit
bodyList.paragraph: Cancel your pension request and lose all the pension choices you've made, so far.

bodyList.heading: Return
bodyList.paragraph: Go back to the current page without quitting.

accessibilityTexts.btnContinue: Choose this button to continue on to the next step in the process.
accessibilityTexts.btnComeBackLater: Choose this button to save all the changes and choices you have made so far, but exit the flow at this time.
accessibilityTexts.btnQuit: Choose this button to exit the flow and save none of the choices you made up to this point.
accessibilityTexts.btnBack: Choose this button to return to the prior page without saving any changes or choices you made on this page.
accessibilityTexts.btnChange: Choose to change your payment choice for Union Benefit available from Premier Pension Plan.
accessibilityTexts.btnReviewOptions: Review options and make payment choices for Cash Balance Benefit available from Premier Cash Balance Plan.
accessibilityTexts.btnDefer: Choose to defer payment choices for Premier Cash Balance Plan.
accessibilityTexts.btnDeferAlt: Choose this button to delay making payment choices until sometime in the future.
accessibilityTexts.btnDeferAllAlt: Choose to defer all payment choices for all pensions.
accessibilityTexts.headerPmtTable: Review options and make or change payment choices for the benefits available in Premier Cash Balance Plan.

editList.editMessage: Make a choice for all of the benefits that appear. You must choose a form of payment for each benefit or choose to defer all of the benefits.

footnotes.footnoteMessage: This is the amount you'll receive before taxes. It doesn't include any payments to your beneficiary (if applicable).
